current_short_description: We are a start-up with expertise in large-scale systems integration for robotics and automation systems. Founded in 2017, Inrovo builds customised software and hardware solutions for enterprise businesses in the manufacturing, precision engineering, logistics, food & beverage sectors. Our team have rich experiences in tech-related businesses in local and regional development ecosystems. Inrovo's strength lies in the understanding and development of Robotics, Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Internet of Things (IoT) end-to-end solutions. OUR VISION is to become a leading provider of disruptive technologies. OUR MISSION is to work with within the eco-system with institutions, research agencies, industry partners, suppliers and other SIs to increase the use robotics and automation solutions.

current_short_description: IXI-Play is building a smart, Android-based robot for young children. They can play games with it; they’ll show the robot cards and it will mimic emotions on them. It sees, hears, speaks and moves. The toy itself retails for $299 but it will also come with an app store and other accessories. It’s a hardware platform that can have customizable skins for different characters so it can either build its own IP or license out IP from other toy companies.

current_short_description: NACT Engineering provides the expertise and accessory products to address such a need. This does away with the need to scrounge for parts that may compromise the overall reliability and technical performance of your robots for years to come. As a bespoke drone solution provider – we create a huge range of specialized modules compatible with your platform. This helps you fulfil a wide array of missions with highly specific demands– all with a few fuss-free adjustments. Our intimate knowledge of drone systems puts us at the forefront of a burgeoning mechanical revolution – empowering us to provide efficient and reliable drone services for all of your industrial and lighting needs. As experts in the field of hard-core engineering, we also provide consulting services. Our clients include the Ministry of Home Affairs, the Defence Science Technology Agency (DSTA), DSO National Laboratories and the Advanced Technology Research Centre.
